title: MALACASA Oval Ceramic Oven Baking Dishes, Ideal for Lasagne, Shepherds Pie and More - Small Pie Dish, Set of 4, 22 OZ, White, Oven Safe
features: The Size for Versatile Needs - Measuring in 10.15 L* 5.15 W* 1.77 H (including Handles), our 8x5-inch ceramic baking dish provides ample space to accommodate baking brownie cake, Lasagna, Gratin, Roasting, or casserole. With a 1.77 inch inner depth to hold multiple layers, this large size ensures you can prepare delicious treats for family gatherings, parties, or any occasion.

Healthier Baking - Our casserole dish is crafted with high-quality and lead-free ceramic material. It has thicker walls for better heat retention and bakes evenly throughout the cooking. It's resistant to high temperatures and sturdy to be used in ovens, microwaves, and Refrigerators, making it a versatile and durable choice for baking.

Convenient Double Handle - Side handles with striped design help ensure a firm grip during transportation, and make taking the baking dish out of the oven a breeze. It's beautiful design let you take the baking dish from oven to table.

Even Baking & Non Sticking - Smooth surface prevents the stains from remaining/sticking easily, super easy to clean and cook so evenly. You can use this baking dish to cook whatever you want to enjoy.

Exquisite Design & Effortless Cleanup - Featured with glossy porcelain, make the casseroles baking dish never get out of style, and helps your houseworking more easy. Convenient handles on both side of baking pans, making it easier to pick it up from the oven or freezer. Exquisite and decorative ceramic bakeware sets are sure to impress your guests!
description: Product Description Convenient Baking Dish with Handle The handles make the lasagna pan easy to grip with oven mitts and transport the oven dish from the oven to the table without burning the finger. Add convenience and ensure safety during the baking process. Space Saving Ceramic casserole dish set can be stacked to save cabinet space. Dishwasher/ Microwave/ Oven Safe Made of a type of premium LEAD-FREE and NON-TOXIC ceramic, the baking dish set with a smooth and bright surface is durable, scratch-resistant, easy to clean and maintain. Daily Use 8x5-inch ceramic baking dish provides ample space to accommodate baking brownie cake, Lasagna, Gratin, Roasting, or casserole.
